title: Mining Remediation Authority financial transactions July 2025
body: "The government is committed to setting new standards for transparency so the public can more easily see how and where taxpayers’ money is being spent and hold politicians, government departments and public bodies to account.  This set shows monthly financial transactions made by the Mining Remediation Authority, as part of the government’s commitment to transparency in expenditure.   Customer services, mining reports and records   Mining Remediation Authority200 Lichfield LaneMansfieldNottinghamshireNG18 4RG     Email customerservice@miningremediation.gov.uk     Telephone 0345 762 6848      "
